text:
Once upon a time, in a sleepy little town named Willow Creek, lived a wise old owl named Old Owly. Old Owly had seen many moons pass since they moved into the nest atop the library. Every morning, he would swoop down from his perch in the oak tree to explore the world below.

One crisp autumn day, while browsing through history books, Old Owly stumbled upon a tale about a bold lion who dared to challenge the king of the jungle. Intrigued, he read until his eyelids grew heavy from exhaustion.

That night, while prowling through the forest whispering secrets to the moon, Old Owly dreamed about that lion. He envisioned himself diving into a river filled with gold fish. Each morning he woke up eager to immerse himself in the golden waters.

Eventually, old owry decided to turn his dream into reality. He cast a mighty pawful into the river, which glistened with glittering gems. Every single morning afterward, he returned
